name: bantayog
description: BANTAYOG — civic-tech nutrition-subsidy PWA. QR-card + sari-sari merchant on-chain settlement via mock PHPC on Ronin Saigon testnet.

scripts.dev:local: concurrently --names hardhat,server --kill-others-on-fail 'pnpm --filter @bantayog/contracts hardhat node' 'wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && pnpm --filter @bantayog/server boot && pnpm --filter @bantayog/server dev'
scripts.deploy:contracts: pnpm --filter @bantayog/contracts compile && pnpm --filter @bantayog/contracts hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
